title: The Valley
content:
A village with a strong formation protecting it. After 
Wang Lin
 broke the array, he helped the inhabitants by giving them the 
Soul Refining Sect
 Techniques such as Soul Refining, Soul Extracting and the method to create soul flags. But he did let a flaw in the way of making the flags so that he could just take them back if there is any problem and that without even needing to refine them. To say it all, this village is the starting point for the New Soul Refining Sect Wang Lin promises to 
Du Tian
.
